allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\PROJETO CLAUDE" -Recurse | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object @{N='Arquivo';E={$_.FullName.Replace\('c:\\PROJETO CLAUDE\\',''\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; cd "c:\\PROJETO CLAUDE"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; cd 'c:\\PROJETO CLAUDE'; npx next dev" -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Host "Servidor iniciado em janela separada")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "ONLINE - Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Aguardando... $_" })

PowerShell(Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; cd "c:\\PROJETO CLAUDE"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; cd 'c:\\PROJETO CLAUDE'; npx next dev" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "ONLINE - Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Erro: $_" })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq "" } | Select-Object Id, CPU, WorkingSet)

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Processo $\($proc.OwningProcess\) encerrado" } else { Write-Host "Nenhum processo na porta 3000" })

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Host "Encerrado PID $\($proc.OwningProcess\)" })
